CRUISE COMPASS ODYSSEY OF THE SEAS TAKE ADVENTURE TO NEW HEIGHTS Welcome to Odyssey of the Seas@! Everyone deserves a vacation. You'll find endless opportunities to make the most of every — like game-changing activities, world-class dining, moment show-stopping entertainment, and plenty of ways to unwind. TRENDING TODAY Raise a Glass to Big Savings: BOGO 60% Off Deluxe Beverage Package Enjoy your favorite drinks all cruise long. Buy one Deluxe Beverage Package at $110 per day, plus 18% gratuity and get one package 60% off. Visit any bar to purchase. Offer only available today. Welcome Aboard Sail Away Dance Party Join DJ Ruby and your Entertainment Activities Team as we bid farewell to Civitavecchia and set sail on our exciting seven day voyage. Enjoy the music and sail away dancing and as we begin this unforgettable voyage together.

Casino Royale, Deck 3, 5:00 pm - Late YOUR HEALTH IS OUR PRIORITY We're all in this together. Here are some things to keep in mind for the health and safety of everyone onboard. Smoking All Royal Caribbean ships are non-smoking (including e-cigarettes) except for designated areas in the Casino (for active players only while playing) and the open decks. Please be sure to properly dispose of cigarettes, cigars, and pipe tobacco. Wash up! The best way to prevent colds, flu and gastrointestinal illnesses - such as Norovirus - is to wash your hands with soap and warm water for at least 20 seconds after bathroom breaks and before eating.

GOOD TO KNOW Time Zone Change: One Hour Ahead Our ship will be passing through an international time zone at 2:00 am. We'll be switching our ship's time to one hour forward. Please remember to set your watches and devices accordingly. When in doubt, check the app for the correct ship time. Onboard Credit If you have an OBC it will be available on your seapass account 24 hrs after the cruise starts. Assistive Listening System (ALS) Guests may request and sign out Assistive Listening Systems (ALS) or Assistive Listening Devices (ALD) available at the Guest Services desk. Complete Your Mandatory Guest Safety Briefing You can complete most of your mandatory guest safety briefing right in the app. Tap on "Safety" and complete the life jacket demonstration and emergency horn testing.

Once onboard, just remember to stop by your assigned assembly station for a quick check-in. Cruise Vessel Security & Safety Act (CVSSA) The Security Guide and embassy information is available for your review at the Guest Services desk. Additionally, you can find this information listed on our company website. Safe Disposal of Medical Needles Do you use medical needles? Keep others safe by discarding them properly. Please see your stateroom attendant to request a sharps container. Safety Briefing Watch the video on your TV or on the app, then check in at your assigned assembly station.

Royal Theater*, Decks 4 & 5, 8:30 pm & 10:30 pm Tw070 Production: The Book: Seven Chapters, One Adventure (Reservations Required) The Book is an eclectic, unpredictable and epic journey that transports its "readers" to amazing new worlds of mystery and wonder. Powered by our collective imaginations and told in seven extraordinary chapters, this breathtaking journey reminds us that in between the front and back covers of a great book, absolutely anything can happen!

Our "readers" are asked to open their minds completely and join their host and guide, the mysterious Librarian, as he turns to page one, chapter one, adventure one. Read on... Shore excursion guests are auto-assigned priority times. You will be able to start booking at 4:00 pm. Play Smart. Swim Smart. Stay Safe. Make a splash at the pool — but keep safety top of mind, too. Although lifeguards are on duty, adult supervision is still required for children ages 12 and under at all times on the pool deck. Take A Towel And Dive Into Adventure With your SeaPass card, you can check out as many towels needed after each new adventure. Make sure to bring your towel back by 5:00 pm on the last day of the sailing.

Casino Royale, Deck 3, 11:00 pm - Midnight YOUR HEALTH IS OUR PRIORITY We're all in this together. Here are some things to keep in mind for the health and safety of everyone onboard. Smoking All ships are non-smoking. Cigarettes, e-cigarettes, pipes, and cigars may be used only in designated open-deck areas when the ship is not bunkering. In Casino Royale, cigarettes and e-cigarettes are allowed only for active players during operating hours or when open decks are closed for bunkering. Chewing tobacco is prohibited. Wash Up and Watch Out! To best prevent illnesses, wash your hands with soap and warm water after bathroom breaks and before eating. Feeling ill? Norovirus symptoms include upset stomach, vomiting and diarrhea. Should you experience any of these symptoms, contact our Medical Staff by dialing 51.

GOOD TO KNOW Alcohol Policy Bar personnel may request verification age for service. The minimum drinking age onboard ships sailing from North America is 21 and 18 onboard ships sailing from South America, Europe, Asia, Australia, and New Zealand. Junior Cruisers Curfew: (17 & Under) Please note there is a mandatory 1:00 am curfew for guests ages 17 and under every evening. After 1:00 am, all minors must be in their staterooms or participating in an organized Adventure Ocean program. Children in Diapers Due to public health regulations, children in diapers, swim diapers, pull-ups, or who aren't completely toilet trained are not allowed in the pools, whirlpools, or the H20 Zone. The Baby Splash area is designated for children in diapers.

11:00 pm HELPFUL TIPS FOR TODAY Getting Around in Santorini, Greece The ship will anchor between Athinios and Fira, and it will be necessary to take a tender to reach the town. There are two ports on the island of Santorini: one for ferries and one for cruise ships. The ferry port is Athinios Port, also known as the "New Port" or "Thira Port". The Old Port of Santorini (aka Skala) accommodates cruise ship tender boats and some private tour boats. The easiest and most common way to reach the Old Port is by cable car. It takes only three minutes. On the other hand, if you're feeling adventurous and decide to walk to the port, it'll be 587 steps up. Oia Blue Domes, you can reach there by public transportation from Fira and takes a 30-minute ride.

Reserve Your Tender Time in the Royal Caribbean App Your ship offers Digitized Tender in the mobile app. To reserve your tender time for today's port of call, open the app, connect to ship Wi Fi, tap "Tender," select your party and time, and wait for a notification to head to the meeting point. Shore excursion guests are auto assigned priority times. Last Tender From Ashore Important note: If you do not return before departure time it is your responsibility to make arrangements to rejoin the ship. Here are some things to keep in mind for the health and safety of everyone onboard. Smoking All ships are non-smoking. Cigarettes, e-cigarettes, pipes, and cigars may be used only in designated open-deck areas when the ship is not bunkering. In Casino Royale, cigarettes and e-cigarettes are allowed only for active players during operating hours or when open decks are closed for bunkering. Chewing tobacco is prohibited. Wash up! The best way to prevent colds, flu and gastrointestinal illnesses- such as Norovirus - is to wash your hands with soap and warm water for at least 20 seconds after bathroom breaks and before eating. GOOD TO KNOW Leaving the Ship and Returning From Port Remember to bring your SeaPass card and a government issued photo ID when leaving the ship - they are needed to reboard.

Please make your way back to the ship and be onboard before the designated time. Enjoy your day in port! Bringing Food Ashore Due to port health regulations, food, including fruits, vegetables and drinks, is not allowed to be taken off the ship when visiting a port or a fine will be issued. Wheelchairs on Tenders Only collapsible wheelchairs will be permitted on tenders. Guests must be able to make a few footsteps to get on and off the tender. Crew members are not allowed to lift wheelchairs with guest seated. Need a Transfer to the Airport? You can book your transfers to FCO (Rome Fiumicino Airport "Leonardo da Vinci") and the Rome Ostiense Train Station. Transfers to FCO is $79 per person one-way (the earliest transfer departure is at 6:45 am for flights that are after

11:00 am), while transfers to Ostiense Train Station are $95 per person one-way (transfer departure is at 9:30 am). Transfers can be purchased via the Royal App or at Guest Services located on deck 4. The deadline to purchase transfers is day 5 at Midnight. All Aboard Please make sure you are on the ship by the hour listed. We hope you had a great time in port, please have your SeaPass ready to be scanned upon your return.

10:30 pm - 11:00 pm HELPFUL TIPS FOR TODAY Getting Around in Kusadasi (Ephesus), Türkiye Kusadasi is a cruise port and resort town on Türkiye's central Aegean Sea coast, and is located south of Izmir. Kusadasi is also a major ferry port and serves as seaport for Ephesus (ancient Greek city in Türkiye's izmir Province). From the cruise ship pier in Kusadasi's harbour the town looks very attractive and passengers can walk to the promenade cafes and shops and then climb to Kale district where, inside the old city walls, there's a mosque, a bazaar and some fine traditional houses. Leaving the Ship and Returning from Port Remember to bring your SeaPass card and a government issued photo ID when leaving the ship - they are needed to reboard. Please make your way back to the ship and be onboard before the designated time. Enjoy your day in port!

Here are some things to keep in mind for the health and safety of everyone onboard. Smoking All ships are non-smoking. Cigarettes, e-cigarettes, pipes, and cigars may be used only in designated open-deck areas when the ship is not bunkering. In Casino Royale, cigarettes and e-cigarettes are allowed only for active players during operating hours or when open decks are closed for bunkering. Chewing tobacco is prohibited. Wash up! The best way to prevent colds, flu and gastrointestinal illnesses- such as Norovirus - is to wash your hands with soap and warm water for at least 20 seconds after bathroom breaks and before eating.

Beverages and other Liquids Local security authorities will dispose of any liquids returning to the ship. Unopened liquor bottles will be stored onboard for safe keeping and returned to guests on the last day of the cruise. Local Port Agriculture Regulations Local port regulations prohibit the addition or removal of agricultural items such as food, fruits, plants, flowers, sea shells, bulbs, and rocks to or from the ship. 11:30 pm HELPFUL TIPS FOR TODAY Getting Around in Naples, Italy Odyssey of the Seas docks in the Port of Napoli which is downtown. Taxi services are available outside the terminal building. Ferry Terminal is located on the left-hand side once you exit the terminal building. The Naples cruise port, known as Stazione Marittima, is one of Italy's busiest, located directly in the city center within walking distance of the historic district. It serves as a major gateway for trips to Pompeii, Capri, and the Amalfi Coast, with the Molo Beverello ferry terminal immediately adjacent. Naples Airport (NAP): Approximately a 15 - 20 minute taxi ride from the port. DESCRIPTION Meet The Effectors; PixelTM: beautiful, sexy, and confident, ReverbTM: unpredictable and mischievous, LumeTM•. a sassy and dynamic supergirl, and Captain VizTM: the leader of the pack, and always first into the fight. Join them as they take to the stage to demonstrate their awesome powers, and then come together to battle their arch nemesis, CrashTM as he tries to take over the world with his army of airborne Drone Soldiers and scary Henchmen.

MP ArtDuo Portrays passion, strength and elegance in a show packed with breathtaking aerial acrobatic tricks and much more. A performance not to be missed. A master of improvisation and an ambassador for the nonconformist, Gareth Oliver will shatter every preconceived notion you have about people who talk to themselves. Nicola presents a powerhouse vocal performance of timeless songs, iconic artists, and feel good anthems across the decades. From pop, rock, to the classical sounds of Andrea Bocelli, this electrifying vocal dynamic show is sure to capture something for everyone in tonight's one woman show. The Book is an eclectic, unpredictable and epic journey that transports its "readers" to amazing new worlds of mystery and wonder.

Powered by our collective imaginations and told in seven extraordinary chapters, this breathtaking journey reminds us that in between the front and back covers of a great book, absolutely anything can happen! Our "readers" are asked to open their minds completely and join their host and guide, the mysterious Librarian, as he turns to page one, chapter one, adventure one. Read on... Our new and totally original mega-production Showgirl! Past. Present. Future., combines next-generation choreography with incredible vocal performances and cutting-edge lighting and video effects, to deliver an entertainment event that will stimulate the full range of human senses. This incredible dance spectacular takes us on a stunning journey that features one of the most iconic of all entertainers, the beautiful Showgirl.
By paying tribute to the past, the present, and the future of this enigmatic and world-famous artist, this remarkable entertainment experience will leave audiences completely awestruck.

'000 am Dear Guest, Please find below important information regarding our digitized tender process: Ship to Shore in Santorini: Digitized Tender in the Royal Caribbean app Odyssey of the Seas will anchor in Santorini. Tenders run every 20 to 30 minutes, with the ride taking approximately 15 minutes each way. Do I need a tender ticket? Seville Spain ooogg Yes. A complimentary digital tender ticket is required for guests wishing to go ashore before 1:30 pm. • Guests may select an available tender time in the Royal Caribbean App for themselves and their travel party. Make sure you have the latest version of the app installed and that you're connected to the ship's Wi-Fi network. • Guests booked on Royal Caribbean Shore Excursions will be automatically assigned a digital tender ticket aligned with their tour time.

• Star and Sky Suite guests, Pinnacle Club members, and The Key participants are automatically assigned a priority tender ticket, allowing them to board a tender at any time. How do I reserve my tender time? You may reserve a tender time directly in the Royal Caribbean App starting on Day 2 at 4:00 pm. If your desired tender time is unavailable and you do not have plans, please check out our available Royal Caribbean shore excursions in the app to make the most of your day. When can I head ashore? You will receive a notification in the Royal Caribbean App when it's time to proceed to your designated meeting point with your digital tender ticket open and ready in the app. Make sure you stay connected to the ship's Wi-Fi network to receive the notification. Returning to the ship Digital tender tickets are not required to return onboard.

The time of the last returning tender will be published in the Cruise Compass, the Royal Caribbean App, and at the gangway. Please be prepared for extended waiting times at the cable car stations. The busiest times are anticipated to be around 1:00 pm going up to Fira and 5:30 pm when returning to the tender area. Guests using scooters and wheelchairs / Those needing assistance Our team is always available to assist you while boarding and disembarking tender boats. • Collapsible wheelchairs can be accommodated on tender boats. • All guests must be able to step onboard and disembark tender boats independently. • Elevators providing direct access to the tender loading area are available. Please ask a staff member for assistance.

At the pier: Access to the cable car station is available via an elevator or ramp located at the station entrance. Once your cable car ticket is purchased, you will be directed to Wagon #1. Assistance from a traveling companion may be required while inside the wagon.

Keep your luggage with you to avoid waiting. • Assigned departure times run from approximately 6:30 am - 7:15 am. Note: Not available for guests requiring wheelchair assistance, Royal Caribbean airport transfers, or shore excursions. Getting Off the Ship Watch channel 2 or check the Royal App for your assigned time. Once the Self-Assist announcement is made, proceed directly to the gangway with your luggage Taxis availability is limited at the terminal.

Available transportation options include Royal Caribbean transfers, private transfers (independently arranged) and complimentary port shuttle with a drop off point at Largo Della Pace. Regular Departure use our luggage assistance service by placing your tagged bags outside your stateroom by 10:00 pm the night before. Assigned departure times run from approximately 6:45 am — 9:30am. Note: Guests needing wheelchair assistance or using Royal Caribbean transfers must check bags the night before. Departure Morning Go to your assigned departure lounge. Proceed to the gangway once your group number is announced on channel 2 or via the App. Shore excursion guests should follow instructions on their tour ticket. Independent travelers may claim luggage at the terminal based on the number printed on their luggage tag.
